heading: Omitted
label: 2141e, 2141f Omitted
notes: CodificationSections are omitted from the Code because of the repeal of sections 2141a to 2141d of this title.Section 2141e, , , , provided for the repeal of sections 2141a to 2141d of this title if, within 2 years after , the United States National Tourism Organization Board had not developed and implemented a comprehensive plan for the long-term financing of the United States National Tourism Organization, and further provided that the Board could suspend or terminate the Organization if sufficient private sector and State or local government funds were not identified or made available to continue the Organization’s operations. [The Board did not develop and implement such a plan within 2 years after .]Pub. L. 104–288, § 7110 Stat. 3407Oct. 11, 1996Oct. 11, 1996Oct. 11, 1996Section 2141f, , , , defined the terms “Organization” and “Board” for purposes of this chapter.Pub. L. 104–288, § 12110 Stat. 3410Oct. 11, 1996
